code:
import io
import string
import list

let line1 = io.read_line()
let line2 = io.read_line()

mut threshold = 0
match line2
when Some(t)
  match string.parse_int(string.trim(t))
  when Some(n)
    threshold = n
  when None
    threshold = 0
  end
when None
  threshold = 0
end

mut output = ""
mut first = true

match line1
when Some(s)
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(n)
        if n > threshold
          if first
            output = "#{n}"
            first = false
          else
            output = "#{output} #{n}"
          end
        end
      when None
      end
    when None
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
when None
end

println(output)
